title: persica albida
intro: Persica albida, also known as the white peach tree, is a species of deciduous tree native to China, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and edible fruit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Persica albida include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant's flowers, leaves, and fruit can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
